geometry._comment_nominal: Nominal size in inches (used for CF size factor lookup)
geometry._comment_actual: Actual dressed dimensions in mm (used in all calculations)

adjustment_factors._comment: User-specified NDS adjustment factors. CF (size factor) is auto-computed from nominal depth.

CD.description: Load Duration Factor — 1.0 = normal (10-yr live load); 0.9 = permanent dead; 1.15 = snow; 1.25 = construction; 1.6 = wind/seismic

CM.description: Wet Service Factor — 1.0 = dry (MC <= 19%); 0.85 = wet service for Fb; 0.97 = wet for Fv; 0.90 = wet for E

Cr.description: Repetitive Member Factor — 1.0 = single/isolated member; 1.15 = repetitive system (>= 3 members, <= 600mm spacing, with sheathing)
